description_long: This bonsai features a slender, upright trunk with a natural wood texture, tapering from a thicker base to a narrower top. Sparse, small green leaves emerge from several points along the trunk, giving the impression of new growth. The root system is exposed and intricate, with thin, wiry roots radiating outward and downward, some of which are slightly curved or bent. Scattered around the roots are small blue spherical elements, possibly representing decorative stones or water droplets. The trunk displays subtle irregularities and bends, adding to its organic appearance. There is no visible pot or container, and the bonsai appears to be suspended or floating, emphasizing its roots and natural form.
description: A slender, upright bonsai with sparse green leaves, exposed wiry roots, and scattered blue decorative elements. The trunk is textured and slightly irregular, with no visible pot.
description_view_0: The bonsai is seen with the trunk upright, several green leaves on the left, and a clear view of the radiating roots and blue elements below.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the trunk's curvature, fewer visible leaves, and a more vertical alignment of the roots and blue elements.
description_view_2: The trunk appears straight with a few leaves on the right, and the roots are more spread out, with blue elements scattered widely.
description_view_3: The trunk curves slightly to the left, with sparse leaves and roots extending downward, and blue elements concentrated below.
attribute_pot_type: No pot is visible; the bonsai appears to be root-exposed and suspended, with no container present.
attribute_trunk_curvature: The trunk is mostly upright with subtle, natural bends and irregularities, resembling an informal upright style with gentle movement.
attribute_branch_arrangement: Branches are sparse and irregularly spaced, emerging from various points along the trunk without a clear pattern, giving a natural, unstructured silhouette.
attribute_leaf_density: The foliage is sparse, with only a few small clusters of leaves present, resulting in an open and airy appearance.
